title: N-PAMP AEAD Registry
description: Schema for the JSON representation of registries/aead.csv: an array of row objects, one per registered AEAD suite. code_point is a 16-bit value (4 hex digits). key_bytes/nonce_bytes/tag_bytes are byte counts constrained to their declared ranges. Wrong-format code_point, missing column, out-of-declared-range byte counts, and empty name/reference are caught here; DUPLICATE code_point values are caught by the companion validate-registries.py.

code_point.description: 16-bit AEAD code point, hex-prefixed, exactly 4 hex digits (e.g. 0x0001).

name.description: AEAD suite name; MUST be non-empty.

key_bytes.description: AEAD key length in octets; declared range 16-32 (128-256 bit keys).

nonce_bytes.description: AEAD nonce length in octets; declared range 8-16.

tag_bytes.description: AEAD authentication-tag length in octets; MUST be 16.

reference.description: Normative reference (e.g. RFC 5116); MUST be non-empty.
